name: usage_anomaly
description: Finds drugs or items ordered significantly more than consumed, detecting procurement waste patterns. Returns items with over 25% waste ratio, sorted by severity.
query: FROM hospital-drugs | STATS total_ordered = SUM(qty_ordered), total_used = SUM(qty_used) BY drug_name, wing_id | EVAL delta = total_ordered - total_used, waste_ratio = TO_DOUBLE(total_ordered - total_used) / TO_DOUBLE(total_ordered) | WHERE waste_ratio > 0.25 | SORT waste_ratio DESC | LIMIT 20
